source_title: Abraji Help Desk — Manual de Jornalismo de Dados
author: Abraji

extracts.extract: Start from scratch: investigate family, former spouses, whereabouts of children. Court records search: note names of parties and lawyers. Personalized biography: family, financial connections, 'who are they really?'
extracts.relevance_rationale: Systematic investigative background research on people through public records is a timeless reporting methodology

extracts.extract: Website owners use the same Google AdSense (Pub-) and Analytics (UA-) IDs across multiple sites. Exploits the 'personal greed' of actors who sacrifice anonymity to maintain advertising revenue, revealing connections between apparently unrelated sites.
extracts.relevance_rationale: The OSINT principle of tracking shared ad/analytics IDs endures but tools and techniques have evolved beyond manual UA/Pub lookups

extracts.extract: Mass outreach: 30–40 messages; replies may come months later.
extracts.relevance_rationale: Persistent mass outreach and patience with sources is a human relationship skill unaffected by automation
